_doc: Import this into n8n or recreate manually. Workflow: Weekly Competitor Monitor

config.note: Use n8n Code node with Puppeteer to render JS-heavy pages
config.script: const puppeteer = require('puppeteer'); const browser = await puppeteer.launch({headless: true, args: ['--no-sandbox']}); const page = await browser.newPage(); await page.goto(item.catalog_url, {waitUntil: 'networkidle2'}); const html = await page.content(); await browser.close(); return [{json: {html, competitor: item}}];

parts.text: 다음 HTML에서 스마트홈/IoT 제품 목록을 추출해. 각 제품의 이름과 상세 페이지 URL을 JSON 배열로 반환해. [{"name": "...", "url": "..."}] 형태로만 반환.

config.note: Compare extracted products with existing DB products, keep only new ones
Same pattern as catalog crawl, but for individual product pages

config.prompt:
너는 IoT/스마트홈 디바이스 스펙 분석 전문가야. 주어진 HTML에서 제품 스펙을 전부 추출해 JSON으로 반환해.

[규칙]
- 페이지에 명시된 모든 스펙 항목을 빠짐없이 추출 → source: 'official'
- 제품군(category)을 반드시 다음 고정 목록 중 하나로 분류: ['카메라', '도어락', '센서', '허브', '조명', '스위치', '기타']
- 기존 등록된 spec_fields 항목: {{existing_spec_fields}} — 이 키에 매핑 시도
- 매핑 안 되는 새 항목은 unmapped_specs로 분리

[출력 형식 - 반드시 이 JSON 구조로만 반환]
{"name": "...", "model": "...", "category": "...", "price": 0, "image_url": "...", "specs": [{"key": "...", "label": "...", "value": "...", "source": "official"}], "unmapped_specs": [{"label": "...", "value": "...", "source": "official"}]}

config.note: For products missing core specs (power, size, connectivity): use Google Custom Search API (free 100/day) to search for model name + specs, then send search results page to Gemini for extraction with source='researched' and source_url recorded. Skip if Custom Search quota exhausted.
Insert product then insert specs (both mapped and unmapped)

n8n_env_vars.GOOGLE_CSE_KEY: Google Custom Search API key (free, 100 queries/day)

manual_steps: 1. Create new workflow 'Weekly Competitor Monitor' in n8n UI
3. Add HTTP Request → GET Supabase competitors (is_active=true)
4. Add HTTP Request → GET Supabase spec_fields (for Gemini context)
5. Add Split In Batches → iterate each competitor
6. Add Code node → Puppeteer crawl catalog page
7. Add HTTP Request → POST to Gemini for product list extraction
8. Add Code node → Filter against existing products in Supabase
9. Add Code node → For each new product: Puppeteer crawl detail page
10. Add HTTP Request → POST to Gemini for spec extraction (use full prompt above)
11. Add HTTP Request (conditional) → Google Custom Search for missing core specs → Gemini extract with source='researched'
12. Add HTTP Request → POST products and specs to Supabase
